generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you hear about what happened with our European allies last year? They cut their defense budgets by 15% to fund domestic programs, leaving us to pick up the slack. This isn't just about money—it's about reliability. When allies don't hold up their end, our national security is on the line. We can't afford to be the only ones committed to our alliances. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurityFirst
